subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! I testify that these are the days of Thy dispensation, wherein Thou hast opened wide the doors of Thy grace and mercy
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی اشهد ان الایام ایامک و فتحت فیها ابواب فضلک و رحمتک علی وجوه عبادک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
